source_meta.source_document: CORAIL Total Hip System and Hip Specialty Resources

systems.system_notes: Cementless hemiarthroplasty construct anchored to official DePuy Synthes CORAIL stem materials and hip specialty resources.

trays.tray_notes: Official CORAIL materials support a dedicated cementless hip stem instrumentation workflow applicable to the hemiarthroplasty construct.

components.component_notes: Official CORAIL materials describe the cementless tapered femoral stem family.
Bipolar femoral head component used with the CORAIL hemiarthroplasty construct.
Inner modular femoral head component compatible with the CORAIL taper within the bipolar construct.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current source material confirms the CORAIL stem family but does not provide a clean DePuy bipolar-head code matrix in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper hemiarthroplasty catalogue or bipolar-head implant listing pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
